creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Alan Somers from comment #23)

But you rename this bug as "[sysutils/fusefs-sshfs]" bug, and close with "Works As Intended" whitch is strange.
I do not agree with sshfs only, but even in this case bug keeping opened until it can be reproduced, no matter reported it somewhere or not.
